title: Email Notification to include the content of specific columns in a thread

posts.author: Hammy (Paul Hammock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

New to the community and I have done some digging but unable to find a thread about this, so please be with me if I haven’t found it elsewhere.

I am building a change control structure for our Controlled Documents, and noticed that when a user has edited a document, the notification email shows the document name, but not the thread it is associated with. Is there a way to include this in the email notification please?

Regards
Paul.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if you provide a bit more information. Which document are you taking about Monday or Google Doc?

Considering you are talking about the notification email sent by that particular platform, No you can not edit it to include anything.

posts.author: HectorFrost (Hector M. Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Paul Hammock:

Hi everyone,

New to the community and I have done some digging but unable to find a thread about this, so please be with me if I haven’t found it elsewhere.

I am building a change control structure for our Controlled Documents, and noticed that when a user has edited a document, the notification email shows the document name, but not the thread it is associated with. Is there a way to include this in the email notification please?

Regards

Hi there,

Welcome to the community! Regarding your question about email notifications for edited documents, the ability to include the associated thread in the notification email typically depends on the system or platform you’re using.

If the platform allows for customization of notification settings, you might be able to modify the email template to include the thread information. Check the documentation or settings for your system to see if that option is available. Alternatively, consider reaching out to support for assistance.

posts.author: Hammy (Paul Hammock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the reply Zaki,

I am talking about any controlled document, be it word doc, excel sheet, visio diag, pdf etc… It would have been nice to associate the notification email to state the thread it was attached to and not just the document name.
